title: Marbella Catamaran Hire 2026: Costs, Tips & Best Boats
html:
Marbella, with its golden beaches and the Sierra Blanca backdrop, is a prime starting point for catamaran hire on the Mediterranean. Departing from Puerto Deportivo de Marbella, you can expect to pay from €1,200 for a full-day skippered catamaran for up to 12 guests. BoatHire24 lets you find a skippered charter from local operators.

How much does it cost to rent a catamaran in Marbella?

A full-day catamaran charter in Marbella ranges from €1,200 to €3,000 depending on size and season. Prices for a bareboat catamaran start at €1,500 per day, while a crewed Lagoon 42 with a skipper runs closer to €2,500. Half-day trips on a motorboat can be found from €500. Always check the listing for extras like fuel and food. You can find a skippered charter in a few minutes.

Where to set off in Marbella

Most catamaran charters depart from Puerto Deportivo de Marbella, a modern marina with 224 berths and easy access to the sea. Another popular base is Puerto Banús, the glamorous port west of Marbella town, known for its superyachts and designer boutiques. From there, you can sail to the Cabopino dunes or anchor off the coast of Estepona. Further east, the Cala de Mijas offers a quieter spot for lunchtime swims. A common route is a 12-nautical-mile cruise to the island of Isla de las Palomas, just off the coast of Cádiz province.

Which boat to rent

Consider the following options for your Marbella trip. You can also see more at browse the listings.

  1. Lagoon 42 catamaran: ideal for families, up to 12 guests, from €2,200 per day.
  2. Azimut 55 motor yacht: perfect for a luxury cruise, 10 guests, from €3,000 half-day.
  3. Axopar 28 open boat: great for fast trips to Marbella’s coves, 8 guests, from €600 half-day.
  4. Prestige 500 flybridge: combines space and speed, 10 guests, from €2,500 per day, check this motor yacht for live availability.

Cost breakdown for boat hire in Marbella

  • Shared catamaran tour: from €85 per person for a 4-hour trip.
  • Small motorboat half-day: €400, €600 for a 6-metre boat without skipper.
  • Catamaran full-day (skipper included): €1,500, €3,000 for up to 12 guests.
  • Crewed yacht charter (multi-day): from €5,000 for a week on a 50-foot Sunseeker.

Do you need a licence to rent a catamaran in Marbella?

In Spain, you generally need a valid boating licence to rent a bareboat catamaran over 6 metres. However, most catamaran charters in Marbella come with a skipper, so no licence is required for guests. For smaller motorboats under 6 metres (up to 15hp), a simple ‘licencia de navegación’ may suffice. The operator on BoatHire24 will confirm exact requirements before booking.

Tip: If you charter a catamaran from Puerto Banús in July, expect the afternoon Levante wind to pick up around 3pm, plan your anchorages accordingly.

At a glance

  • Price band: €600, €3,000 per day
  • Peak months: June to September
  • Trip length: 4 hours to full day
  • Capacity: up to 12 guests
  • Currency: EUR

Questions about boat rental in Marbella

Can I rent a catamaran for a sunset cruise in Marbella?

Yes, many operators in Marbella offer 2-hour sunset trips departing around 7pm from Puerto Deportivo, ideal for groups of up to 10 people.

What is the best month for catamaran hire in Marbella?

July and August offer the calmest seas and warmest waters, but May, June and September provide quieter conditions and lower prices.

Do I need to pay a deposit?

A refundable security deposit of €500, €2,000 is common for bareboat catamarans; skippered charters usually require no deposit beyond the booking fee.

Can I bring my own food and drink?

Most charters allow you to bring your own provisions, although some vessels offer catering packages at an extra cost.

Whether you hire a catamaran for a day or a week, Marbella’s coastline offers endless coves and clear water. To compare verified boats and read owner reviews, browse the listings on BoatHire24. Boat owners in Marbella can also list their vessel and earn income.

Written by the BoatHire24 team, who book and list verified boats in Marbella and hundreds of destinations worldwide.
